name: Bola Ahmed Adekunle Tinubu

education.notes: Wikipedia states 'summa cum laude', GPA 3.54. Chicago State University transcript records have been subject of public controversy — see scandal_log.

current_office: President of the Federal Republic of Nigeria
godfathers_backers: Tinubu himself considered the APC's Lagos godfather and primary national sponsor

scandal_log.description: U.S. asset forfeiture: ~$460,000 forfeited related to alleged heroin trafficking proceeds. Civil forfeiture, not criminal conviction.
Code of Conduct Bureau trial — alleged illegal foreign accounts. Outcome unclear from Wikipedia source.
EFCC cleared of money laundering charges.
'Bullion van' incident — armoured vehicles seen at his Lagos residence on election day 2019. Tinubu stated 'I keep money anywhere I want.'

Chicago State University transcripts: during 2023 presidential election, opponents obtained CSU records raising questions about the name on the degree ('Bola Tinubu' vs. birth name). Subject of ongoing public controversy.

sources.name: Wikipedia — Bola Tinubu (general; specific transcript controversy needs separate fetch)
